'''zadufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalassochelydian|thalassochelydian]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalassochelydian|thalassochelydian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zadufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædifith|zædifith]] || [[word:zædifij|zædifij]] || [[word:zædifish|zædifish]] || [[word:zædifi|zædifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadudufuth|zadudufuth]] || [[word:zadudufuj|zadudufuj]] || [[word:zadudufush|zadudufush]] || [[word:zadudufu|zadudufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadufuth|zadufuth]] || [[word:zadufuj|zadufuj]] || [[word:zadufush|zadufush]] || [[word:zadufu|zadufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zaduffuth|zaduffuth]] || [[word:zaduffuj|zaduffuj]] || [[word:zaduffush|zaduffush]] || [[word:zaduffuf|zaduffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadufuthu|zadufuthu]] || [[word:zadufuju|zadufuju]] || [[word:zadufushu|zadufushu]] || [[word:zadufuku|zadufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadufuth|zadufuth]] || [[word:zadufuj|zadufuj]] || [[word:zadufush|zadufush]] || [[word:zadufu|zadufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadufuthul|zadufuthul]] || [[word:zadufujul|zadufujul]] || [[word:zadufushul|zadufushul]] || [[word:zadufukul|zadufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadufuthuthu|zadufuthuthu]] || [[word:zadufujuju|zadufujuju]] || [[word:zadufushushu|zadufushushu]] || [[word:zadufuku|zadufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadufuthun|zadufuthun]] || [[word:zadufujun|zadufujun]] || [[word:zadufushun|zadufushun]] || [[word:zadufukun|zadufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadufuthuoro|zadufuthuoro]] || [[word:zadufujuoro|zadufujuoro]] || [[word:zadufushuoro|zadufushuoro]] || [[word:zadufukuoro|zadufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
